Game.Name: Taiketsu!! Brass Numbers (Japan)
Game.plot: Doomsday Warrior is an Action game, developed and published by Laser Soft,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: View every characters endingThis is a very wierd trick I doubt anyone else has discovered. If you have a Super Scope, plug it into the second controller port, put the game in and turn the system on. You will see a number. You can use the D pad to make the number go higher or lower. Press a button after you select the number and you one of the endings of the fighters in the game will play.
